section: SCHEDULE A - ASSETS AND "UNEARNED" INCOME (Blocks A-E grid, first/instruction page)
free_text:
Schedule A grid page (Block A Assets and/or Income Sources; Block B Value of Asset, columns A-M: None, $1-$1,000, $1,001-$15,000, $15,001-$50,000, $50,001-$100,000, $100,001-$250,000, $250,001-$500,000, $500,001-$1,000,000, $1,000,001-$5,000,000, $5,000,001-$25,000,000, $25,000,001-$50,000,000, Over $50,000,000, Spouse/DC Asset over $1,000,000*; Block C Type of Income: NONE, DIVIDENDS, RENT, INTEREST, CAPITAL GAINS, EXCEPTED/BLIND TRUST, TAX-DEFERRED, Other Type of Income (Specify: e.g., Partnership Income or Farm Income); Block D Amount of Income, columns I-XII: None, $1-$200, $201-$1,000, $1,001-$2,500, $2,501-$5,000, $5,001-$15,000, $15,001-$50,000, $50,001-$100,000, $100,001-$1,000,000, $1,000,001-$5,000,000, Over $5,000,000, Spouse/DC Asset with Income over $1,000,000*; Block E Transaction: P, S, S(part), or E).

Pre-printed example rows only (Mega Corp Stock, Simon & Schuster, ABC Hedge Fund) — not filer data.

Handwritten/typed in the data-row area of Block A (no checkboxes marked in any block):

"Please see the attached"
"Note: Dependent Child"
"not applicable last year"

Remaining data rows blank. Footer: "Use additional sheets if more space is required."
